title: Hole.io
notes:
The hole is hungry - and now, so is your inner collector.

• COLLECTIBLES ARE HERE - Dive into levels, hunt for hidden spheres, and crack them open to discover unique figurines. Build your themed Album, complete the set before time runs out, and earn special rewards along the way. Got duplicates? Turn them into coins and keep hunting.
• A CLEANER GAME - Banner ads have been completely removed. Nothing between you and your next meal.

Swallow it all. Update now!

Tack för ditt stöd!
Denna uppdatering ger nytt innehåll och visuella förbättringar för att förbättra din spelupplevelse:
1. Nya nivåer upplåsta: Det totala antalet nivåer har nått 3000 – fler pussel väntar!
2. Galleri-uppdatering: Vi har optimerat galleriet för smidigare bläddring och ett mer intuitivt sätt att visa din samling.

Vi arbetar alltid för att göra appen bättre för dig.

title: Jelly Busters: Puzzle Game
notes: We are incredibly excited to announce the official launch of Jelly Busters! Drop into the coolest skatepark in town and experience a puzzle game that is as colorful and beautiful as it is satisfying. With soft ASMR pops, glowing hues, and hidden artistic masterpieces to destroy, every run is a relaxing yet thrilling ride...grab your board to join the crew and start busting!

title: Among Us!

New Cosmic Cosmicube for 70 Stars.
Celebrate 8 years of Among Us on June 15th with a present from us to you.

And don't forget to check out all the news on our brand new game, Among Us Story: On Guard!

UNOversity Memories-evenemang
